title: Escuintla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Escuintla with a Z-Score of +4.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Escuintla is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, and the wind speed is approximately 8.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating requirements, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: All necessary precautions should be taken to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Escuintla.
